block_00: Your account has been charged a service fee
block_02: This email is to notify you that your trading account with
block_03: has not been active for 90 days. Consequently, your account has been charged a
block_04: service fee (or the equivalent amount in another currency) as per our General Fees policy.
block_07: in case no operations are performed on a trading account in the span of 90 (Ninety) calendar days, the account shall be considered Inactive and the Company is entitled to apply a monthly service fee of 10 Euro (or the equivalent amount in another currency on the day of deduction of the fee) to the remaining balance of the Client’s account.
block_09: If you would like to continue doing business with us, you need to perform an activity and/or transaction in your trading account. Your account will not be charged a service fee.
block_10: If you do not wish to continue using our services, please visit your account and withdraw your funds.
